Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Urzaia Woodsman]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Urzaia is a person Calder mentions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Urzaia Woodsman crafts the meals onboard The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Urzaia is the ship's cook.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Urzaia is known by the name Woodsman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Urzaia rose to his feet with a hatchet in each hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Urzaia is a man on watch duty.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Urzaia is a crew member who fights with a black hatchet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Urzaia has a scarred face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — Urzaia is a large man with two missing teeth and arms wrapped in leather and gold-scaled hide.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — Urzaia Woodsman was banished to the arena in hopes that the fights would kill him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — Urzaia is a character present on the ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Urzaia is a character who responds to Calder's shout with an animal roar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Urzaia is a blond man who fights with two black hatchets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Urzaia is a Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Urzaia used a hatchet to strike a bone-crab.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Calder thinks of Urzaia's promise.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — Calder believes he needs Urzaia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 17''' — Urzaia Woodsman is an Izyrian gladiator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — Urzaia is a crew member who can sense the presence of Shera's partner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — Urzaia Woodsman is a former member of the Champion's Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Urzaia tracked a Consultant target to the far side of the island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Urzaia Woodsman draws on the strength of a Sandborn Hydra and carries two hatchets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Urzaia is inside the boulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Urzaia swings a hatchet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Urzaia is a person Calder Marten believes might be killed by the current interruption.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Calder intends to save Urzaia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Urzaia is an Izyrian gladiator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Urzaia is also referred to as Woodsman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Urzaia was killed by the Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — Urzaia is a Soulbound warrior with a hole in his chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — Urzaia's full name is Urzaia Woodsman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — Urzaia is deceased.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Urzaia Woodsman is the Soulbound cook and the largest member of the crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Urzaia Woodsman looks like an Izyrian gladiator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Urzaia is a person who could potentially attack if woken up.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Urzaia Woodsman uses a black hatchet in each hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Urzaia Woodsman has a fire-hurling wife.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Meia was grappling with Urzaia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Urzaia Woodsman is a Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — Urzaia Woodsman is a fighter with a scarred face and mismatched armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — Urzaia is someone Shera planned to fight in the underground arena.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — Urzaia Woodsman is a Champion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — Urzaia Woodsman kicked Meia away in a bloody fury.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — Urzaia Woodsman prepared to lunge with a black hatchet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — Calder is kneeling by Urzaia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — Urzaia Woodsman has given up his hold on life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — Urzaia was a Champion with an enhanced body.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 2''' — Urzaia is someone Calder has lost.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — Meia possesses a similar quality to Urzaia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 7''' — Urzaia is a prisoner being held in a cage on the ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 9''' — Urzaia is a former Champion and Navigator captain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — Meia is a Consultant who can fight Urzaia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — Meia has enough enhancements to fight toe-to-toe with Urzaia Woodsman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 15''' — Urzaia was condemned to the arena to die.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 15''' — Urzaia wears mismatched armor consisting of leather straps and chain mesh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 15''' — Urzaia has a gold-scaled hide wrapped around his left arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 15''' — Urzaia uses black hatchets as his signature weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 15''' — Urzaia has an ornate belt-buckle carved in the image of a snake eating its own tail.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 15''' — Urzaia has defied the Emperor's command to die on the sands for three years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 15''' — The Woodsman is an undefeated fighter in the arena.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Urzaia was killed by Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 17''' — There is a daring plan to rescue Urzaia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — Urzaia is being planned for rescue by Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — Urzaia Woodsman ran toward the Cinderbeast.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — Urzaia Woodsman rode the Cinderbeast's back like a horseman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — Urzaia wears a golden hide around his upper arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — Urzaia used Awakened weapons and Soulbound powers to strike the Cinderbeast.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — Urzaia claims to be a very good cook.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Urzaia is a missing member of Calder's crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 21''' — Urzaia is a Champion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 21''' — The crew's objective is to get Urzaia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Urzaia Woodsman uses hatchets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Urzaia promised to stand in front of Calder.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Urzaia is a person Calder's crew members knew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 8''' — Urzaia Woodsman is the cook on The Testament and a Champion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 8''' — Urzaia has blue eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 8''' — Urzaia emerged from the woods holding a hatchet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 10''' — Urzaia is a Champion who carries a hatchet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 10''' — Urzaia is sleeping in the tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — Urzaia is someone who often sleeps in their armor and keeps weapons close.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Urzaia's laughter echoed over the ocean.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Urzaia claimed to be undefeated in the Izyrian arena.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 18''' — Urzaia is a huge man with blue eyes and dirty blond hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 18''' — Urzaia wears gladiator regalia and leather armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Urzaia could stem the flow of giant worms.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
